# License Header Template

Use this header for first-party shared source files that should carry explicit Apache 2.0 attribution.

```c
/*
 * <file_name>
 * Part of the CodeWork Shared Libraries
 * Copyright (c) 2026 Caleb S. V.
 * Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0
 */
```

Notes:
- Do not overwrite upstream third-party license headers (for example vendored SQLite/cJSON files).
- Keep third-party attributions in `shared/NOTICE`.
- Keep the repo license text in `shared/LICENSE`.
